caseTitle: Former Nonprofit Director Pleads Guilty to Theft of More Than $200K

caseTitle: Attorney General Yost’s Statement on Fallen Canton Police Officer

caseTitle: Former Treasurer Sentenced for Stealing $40,000 From Wellston School Booster Club
summary: The former treasurer of a Wellston City Schools booster club has been sentenced to 24 months in prison for stealing more than $40,000 from the organization, Ohio Attorney General Dave Yost announced today.

caseTitle: AG’s Office Receives International Recognition for Environmental Enforcement Initiative

summary: Ohio Attorney General Dave Yost joined by 18 other state attorneys general are urging U.S. Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer to act immediately to prevent the 42 million Americans who benefit from the federal Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) from going hungry.

caseTitle: Yost Secures Temporary Removal of Miami Township Fiscal Officer

caseTitle: Mahoning County Man Arrested in Decades-Old Rape Case

defendants: the Northeast Ohio Human Trafficking Task Force
